subject: feat(theme): add Uniwind + DaisyUI theme foundation
body:
Install Uniwind (v1.6.1) and Tailwind CSS (v4.2.2) as the new styling
engine, replacing the custom StyleSheet-based theme system incrementally.

Define 7 DaisyUI v5 theme variants (cupcake, aqua, emerald, forest,
nord, abyss, dracula) organized into 4 light/dark combos (Teal, Nature,
Nordic, Bold). Default combo is Teal (cupcake/aqua), closest match to
the original teal/amber brand identity.

Both old (useAppTheme) and new (Uniwind) systems coexist — components
will be migrated incrementally in subsequent PRs.

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, tailwind, infrastructure
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: minor
